meta.title: BarakahPay — Purpose-Bound Remittances on Stellar
meta.description: Send money for what matters. School fees paid directly. Proof of use on-chain. Trusted remittance rails for the Pakistan corridor.

hero.subtitle: Purpose-bound remittances built on Stellar. Sponsor a student's education directly — with on-chain proof the fees reached the school.

how.title: Four steps. Full transparency.
how.subtitle: Every transaction is bound to a specific purpose and delivered directly to a verified institution.

step1.title: Choose a verified school
step1.body: Browse our network of verified schools in Pakistan and pick where your money should go.

step2.title: Deposit securely
step2.body: Fund your escrow via MoneyGram. Your USD converts to on-chain USDC and is purpose-locked.

step3.title: School receives payment
step3.body: The verified school claims the payment directly to their business bank account in PKR.

step4.title: You get proof
step4.body: On-chain receipt confirms exactly where the money went. Full audit trail forever.

features.title: Built for the diaspora that cares.
features.subtitle: Traditional remittances just move money. BarakahPay guarantees purpose.

one.title: Purpose-locked money
one.body: Funds can only reach a verified school for a specific student. No misdirection, no borrowing, no guesswork.

two.title: On-chain proof of use
two.body: Every payment produces a permanent, verifiable receipt on Stellar. Peace of mind for every sender.

three.title: Institution-first design
three.body: Schools receive PKR directly to their business bank account through regulated rails — no crypto complexity for them.

four.title: Ultra-low fees
four.body: Sub-cent network costs on Stellar mean more of your money reaches its purpose. Not the middlemen.

five.title: Faith-aligned
five.body: Perfect for Zakat, Sadaqah, and family sponsorships where accountability matters as much as generosity.

six.title: Fast settlement
six.body: Sub-second on-chain finality. Schools get funds within hours, not days.

waitlist.title: Be first in line when we launch.
waitlist.subtitle: We're onboarding senders and schools now for our Pakistan corridor beta. Reserve your spot below.
waitlist.successBody: Thank you for joining. We'll reach out as soon as our beta is ready for your role and region.
waitlist.errorRequired: Please fill in all required fields.
waitlist.errorEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
waitlist.errorSubmit: Something went wrong. Please try again.

footer.tagline: Built with intention for underserved corridors.
